I need to install p7zip-full and the libcompress module because it seems the 7z command isn't found. I should update my todo statuses after this step. I plan to use the shell command apt-get, which might take a little while but should be quick enough. I don’t think I need to list the parent directory. I’ll run the install sequentially with one command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y p7zip-full libcompress-raw-lzma-perl.
